headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://www.youtube.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://img.youtube.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://i.imgur.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
